goals: Search for any existing context about the professor's analysis of the Soviet Union's influence on Eastern Europe
Store specific counter-arguments and historical evidence challenging the professor's analysis
List all stored memories to verify the challenge points were captured correctly
Delete any irrelevant memories that don't pertain to the historical debate

user_agent_config.personality: Critical and methodical. Prefers well-sourced arguments and precise historical context. Engages with academic discourse directly but respectfully.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in Eastern European history and Soviet influence but unfamiliar with memory management tools or technical implementations.

end_condition: The user has stored their counter-arguments and verified the relevant memories are captured while removing unrelated content.
